assertions.title: Homepage has 5 carousel sections with correct headings

steps.observed: Homepage loaded successfully

steps.expected: 5 sections: Popular Events, Football Matches, Live Concerts, Basketball Games, Team Merchandise
steps.observed: All 5 headings found via DOM query

steps.expected: Each section has a See All link
steps.observed: 5 See All links found, one per section
Full homepage screenshot captured showing all 5 sections

assertions.title: Horizontal carousel scroll with snap behavior

steps.action: Check scroll-snap CSS on carousel containers
steps.expected: scroll-snap-type: x mandatory on each carousel
steps.observed: All 5 scrollable containers have scroll-snap-type: x mandatory and overflow-x: auto

steps.expected: Cards extend beyond viewport, signaling scrollability
steps.observed: All 5 carousels have scrollWidth (1432-2712px) > clientWidth (375px)

steps.action: Take screenshot showing peek of next card
steps.expected: Partial next card visible at right edge
steps.observed: Screenshot shows partial card visible at right edge of Popular Events carousel

assertions.title: See All links navigate to correct category pages

steps.action: Check See All href for Football Matches
steps.observed: /football - correct
Navigated to /football, page loaded with 14 football events

steps.action: Check See All href for Live Concerts
steps.observed: /concert - correct
Navigated to /concert, page loaded with content

steps.action: Check See All href for Basketball Games
steps.observed: /basketball - correct
Navigated to /basketball, page loaded with content

steps.action: Check See All href for Team Merchandise
steps.expected: Links to product listing page, loads with content
steps.observed: Links to /products but /products redirects to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fproducts — requires authentication, not guest-accessible

steps.action: Check See All href for Popular Events
steps.observed: Links to /football — same as Football Matches, not a dedicated popular events page

evidence.network: GET /football -> 200, GET /concert -> 200, GET /basketball -> 200, GET /products -> 302 redirect to /login

assertions.issues: Team Merchandise 'See All' links to /products which requires authentication and redirects to /login. This page should be guest-accessible for browsing. Additionally, Popular Events 'See All' links to /football instead of a dedicated events page.

assertions.title: Carousel cards navigate to correct detail pages

steps.action: Click event card (Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers) in Popular Events carousel
steps.observed: Navigated to /events/event-stable-005 showing 'Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers', $145.00 at Footprint Center, Phoenix — matches card

steps.action: Click product card (Morocco Football Fan Face Paint Kit) in Team Merchandise carousel
steps.observed: Navigated to /products/cmn8elchd000pl05vas1p2yl2 showing 'Morocco Football Fan Face Paint Kit', $9.99 — matches card

assertions.title: Each carousel section has at least 5 cards

steps.action: Count cards in each carousel section
steps.observed: All 5 sections have 8 cards each: Popular Events (8), Football Matches (8), Live Concerts (8), Basketball Games (8), Team Merchandise (8)
Event cards show team names (title), date (e.g. May 21, 2026), venue (e.g. Footprint Center, Phoenix), and price ($145.00). All fields populated.
Product cards show name (e.g. Morocco Football Fan Face Paint Kit), price ($9.99), and image (flag image). All fields populated.

steps.action: Check for blank or missing fields
steps.observed: All 3 sampled event cards and 3 sampled product cards have complete metadata

assertions.title: Homepage no longer shows flat product grid as sole content

steps.expected: Carousel sections instead of flat 2-column grid
steps.observed: Homepage has 5 horizontal carousel sections with scroll-snap behavior. No grid-cols-2 elements found. Layout is carousel-based.
Zero elements with grid-cols-2 class found in the homepage DOM

assertions.title: Category pages show at least 8 items each

steps.observed: 14 event items displayed
14 event items displayed
14 event items displayed
Viewport set to 375x812
body.scrollWidth=375, body.clientWidth=375, documentElement.scrollWidth=375, documentElement.clientWidth=375. No overflow.
All 5 carousels have overflow-x: auto with scrollWidth > clientWidth, but the page body has no overflow

assertions.title: Loading skeletons shown while data fetches

steps.action: Verify skeleton components exist in codebase
steps.expected: Skeleton, ProductCardSkeleton, MatchCardSkeleton, HorizontalCarouselSkeleton components exist
steps.observed: All skeleton components exist in components/ui/Skeleton.tsx and components/ui/HorizontalCarousel.tsx with proper animate-pulse styling and data-testid attributes

steps.action: Verify skeletons used in homepage loading state
steps.expected: isLoading ternary renders HorizontalCarouselSkeleton for each section
steps.observed: app/page.tsx uses useState(true) for isLoading and renders HorizontalCarouselSkeleton for all 5 sections (Popular Events, Football Matches, Live Concerts, Basketball Games, Team Merchandise) when isLoading is true
Localhost API responds too fast (<30ms) to capture skeleton state in screenshot. The isLoading state transitions from true to false almost instantly. Code review confirms correct implementation.

assertions.issues: Could not visually capture the skeleton state in a screenshot because localhost API responds in <30ms. Code review confirms HorizontalCarouselSkeleton components are properly rendered during the isLoading=true state for all 5 carousel sections.

frictions.description: The /products page requires authentication and redirects to /login, preventing guest access to the Team Merchandise listing page via See All link
Popular Events 'See All' links to /football instead of a dedicated events page
Loading skeletons render too briefly on localhost to capture in screenshots due to near-instant API response times
frictions.resolution: Verified skeleton implementation through code review of components/ui/Skeleton.tsx, components/ui/HorizontalCarousel.tsx, and app/page.tsx

frictions.description: After navigating back from a detail page, the homepage snapshot sometimes returns fewer interactive elements requiring an additional wait for data to reload
frictions.resolution: Added 2-second wait after navigation back to allow client-side data re-fetch to complete

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 9 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CONTENT-005: Team Merchandise See All links to /products which requires auth and redirects to /login instead of being guest-accessible; Popular Events See All links to /football instead of a dedicated events page).
